Classify the sentiment of the following text as exactly one of: positive, negative, or neutral.

Rules:
- "positive" means the text expresses approval, happiness, or satisfaction.
- "negative" means the text expresses disapproval, sadness, or dissatisfaction.
- "neutral" means the text is factual, balanced, or does not express clear sentiment.

If the sentiment is mixed, choose the label that best describes the overall tone.

Respond with only the label — no explanation.

Text: {text}
Label:
